import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(byte)
      if byte == 32 or byte == 9 or byte == 13
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(byte)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn binary_search(_ xs: List<Int>, _ t: Int) -> Option<Int>
  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = xs.len() - 1
  mut found: Option<Int> = None
  mut done = false
  while not done and lo <= hi
    let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
    match xs.get(mid)
    when Some(v)
      if v == t
        found = Some(mid)
        done = true
      else if v < t
        lo = mid + 1
      else
        hi = mid - 1
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  found
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line1)
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line2)
      let xs = parse_ints(line1)
      let trimmed = string.trim(line2)
      match string.parse_int(trimmed)
      when Some(t)
        match binary_search(xs, t)
        when Some(idx)
          println("index=#{idx}")
        when None
          println("not_found")
        end
      when None
        println("not_found")
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
